title: Smartsheet vs Wrike
description: Compare Smartsheet vs Wrike in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Smartsheet emerges as our recommendation for most users based on overall performance, feature set, and value. However, Wrike is an excellent choice if you prioritize specific features like project management capabilities. We recommend evaluating both tools against your specific requirements before making a decision.

faqs.question: Which is better, Smartsheet or Wrike?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Smartsheet edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5 for Wrike. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. Smartsheet excels at Spreadsheet-based work management platform for enterprises., while Wrike is stronger for Enterprise project management platform with robust reporting..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Smartsheet and Wrike?
faqs.answer: Smartsheet and Wrike differ in several key areas: pricing ($7-25/mo vs $9.80-34.80/mo), target audience, and core feature focus. Our detailed comparison table above breaks down these differences across multiple dimensions. Our team spent 27 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Is Smartsheet better than Wrike for enterprises?
faqs.answer: For enterprise use, Smartsheet generally offers more robust features, but the right choice depends on your specific enterprise requirements including security, compliance, and integration needs.

faqs.question: Is Smartsheet cheaper than Wrike?
faqs.answer: Smartsheet starts at $7-25/mo while Wrike starts at $9.80-34.80/mo. Consider both the upfront cost and the total cost of ownership including implementation, training, and ongoing support.

faqs.question: Which tool has better integrations, Smartsheet or Wrike?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer extensive integration ecosystems, though they focus on different categories. Smartsheet integrates well with project management tools, while Wrike connects with project management platforms.

faqs.question: Can I use Smartsheet and Wrike together?
faqs.answer: Yes, many organizations use both tools for different purposes. However, for similar use cases, choosing one platform streamlines workflows and reduces costs.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Smartsheet or Wrike?
faqs.answer: Both tools are designed with user experience in mind. Smartsheet is known for its intuitive interface, while Wrike offers comprehensive onboarding resources. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support quality varies. Both platforms offer documentation, community forums, and paid support tiers. User reviews indicate generally positive experiences with both.
